title: Amara Raja Batteries is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Amara Raja Batteries is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Quality Control Engineer looking for your next big career move? Amara Raja Batteries in Kolkata offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Amara Raja Batteries:
Amara Raja Batteries is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Amara Raja Batteries!
